title: RealTeam Combine
description: A minecraft Texturepack make your game better and colorful, good for survival, pvp, cpvp, roleplay, record, eye-pleasing colors, fps boost, and adding some accessories
body:
##  ENG
**make your game better and colorful, good for survival, pvp, cpvp, roleplay, record, eye-pleasing colors, fps boost, and adding some accessories, makes emotcraft animation movements more flexible, has additional bones, and is not stiff**

  
## IND
**membuat game anda lebih baik dan berwarna, baik untuk survival, pvp, cpvp, roleplay, record, warna yang enak dipandang, fps boost, dan menambahkan beberapa aksesoris, membuat gerakan animasi emotcraft lebih fleksibel, memiliki tulang tambahan, dan tidak kaku**

- 

**requires: optifine/cit resewn**

**optional: RP Renames (to see other renames)**

**compatipble with emotcraft and not stiff**

###  curved pumpkine rename
